security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: http://127.0.0.1:* ws: wss:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';

bundle.shortDescription: Bloomberg-style financial terminal with real-time news and market data
bundle.longDescription: A Bloomberg Terminal-inspired desktop application providing real-time financial market data, news feeds, crypto prices, and more in a classic terminal interface.
